summary: I used the local `cautilus` skill and invoked `./bin/cautilus skill test --repo-root . --adapter-name self-dogfood-skill-test`. The run failed in preflight because `./bin/cautilus install --repo-root . --overwrite` could not write `/.agents/skills/cautilus/SKILL.md` in this sandbox. Exact recommendation from the checked-in fixture is `accept-now` for the `fixtures/skill-evaluation/accept-now-input.json` path, but the live skill-test command is currently blocked until the workspace allows the install step.
